title: Q2 enterprise win rate sits at 31% versus trailing four-quarter 22%
anchor: Eight of 26 enterprise deals closed-won this quarter at an average $187K compared to $142K across the four-quarter window.
connect: Marketing-sourced enterprise deals convert at 29% while outbound converts at 14%.
body: Eight of 26 enterprise deals closed-won this quarter at an average $187K compared to $142K across the four-quarter window. Marketing-sourced enterprise deals convert at 29% while outbound converts at 14%.
trace: Enterprise win rate up significantly quarter over quarter with marketing sourcing performing 2x better than outbound in enterprise segment.
